title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.285 - Delinquent taxes — notice (second class counties)
text:
52.285.  Delinquent taxes — notice (second class counties). — The collector of revenue in all counties of the second class shall on or before December thirty-first of each year send appropriate notices of the total amount of delinquent real estate taxes due and owing to each person shown by his records as owing delinquent taxes.
(L. 1979 S.B. 385, A.L. 1987 S.B. 65, et al.) 
Effective 1-01-88
